prompts.global_base: systems-failure editorial collage, post-digital breakdown plate, zero-letter image logic, recognizable historical fragments redesigned as layered montage, one anchor fragment plus layered support fragments, torn paper, ripped seams, soft paper seams, mechanical silhouette fragments, distressed print texture, fragmented historical imagery, dark-cream field split, oxidized teal, muted copper, pale lilac accents, designed asymmetry, poster compression, type-friendly negative space, serious and investigative, no clear faces, non-photographic, non-heroic, institutional, unsensational, anti-gloss futurism
prompts.scene_base: designed editorial scene plate, control-room or institutional architecture can survive only as a cropped shard, layered support fragments can repeat or cut across the frame, tension built through collage rather than scenic realism, traces of human presence only, safe-zone aware composition
prompts.packaging_base: bold packaging collage, clear small-size legibility through silhouette and value contrast, recognizable anchor object carried by a dominant anchor fragment and layered support fragments, poster montage logic, controlled overlays only, title-friendly negative space, serious rather than lurid
prompts.thumbnail_base: landscape poster montage, anchor fragment weighted right or center-right, left-side or upper-left quiet field preserved for title lockup, strong value split, broad silhouette, support fragments reinforce the anchor without dissolving the read
prompts.shorts_base: portrait poster montage, anchor fragment large and mobile-legible, recognizable anchor object centered in stacked vertical layering, controlled torn edges, strong header-safe negative space, support fragments stay subordinate to the main signal
prompts.refine_base: preserve the anchor fragment, preserve the layered support fragments, preserve torn paper and soft paper seams, add edge clarity and material depth without collapsing into realism, readable marks, or oversized ripped-paper slabs
prompts.final_base: canonical final deliverable, preserve the anchor fragment, preserve the layered support fragments and the support-fragment hierarchy, preserve reserved negative space, preserve zero-letter editorial collage language, preserve palette control and non-readable overlays
